prose.en: Providers MUST receive and react to email messages from FedRAMP without disruption and without requiring additional actions from FedRAMP.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: This requirement is intended to prevent cloud service providers from requiring FedRAMP to complete a CAPTCHA, log into a customer portal, or otherwise take service-specific actions that might prevent the security team from receiving the message.
